R. B. Corcoran of Harrison, Idaho,
is at the Grand.


Get it at Watson's Drug Store.


A. M. jenkins, prominent at St.
Maries, Idaho, is at the Grand.


Pearl soap is white as snow ard as
large as any yellow laundry soap 1t
costs the same-5 cents per cake.


Genevieve Carney and Eliza Sexton
of Granite, Idaho. are at the Victoria.


Duffy's 10-acre tracts on the Little
Spokane will be advanced after
April 10.


A. V. Chamberlin, mayor of Occur
d Alene, was in the city few hours
today.


That sore spot is always reached by
an Onion and Belladonna Plaster.
Get one this week as a trial for 15c
at Red Cross pharmacy. O601 Mon
roe street.


Members of the Pacific Hardware &
Nail association are meeting at the
Hotel Spokane this morning. There are
representatives from Portland, Taco
ma and Seattle.


Foley's Honey and Tar contains no
opiates, and will not constipate like
nearly all other cough medicines. Re-
fuse substitutes. Sold by Chas. Nc
Nab, 402 Riverside avenue.


Masons of Boise have purchased a
$4,000 building site and will build a
three-story or four-story temple l05x
122 feet, commencing work probably
this summer.


Foleys Kidney Cure makes kidneys
and bladder right. Don't delay taking
Sold by Chas. McNab, 402 Riverside
avenue.


r. R. Maitland of Vancouver. b. c.
reported to the police this morning
that dress suit case containing black
Prince Albert coat, a silk hat and some
letters had been stolen from him at
the Great Northern depot.


Foley's Kidney Cure If taken in
time affords security from all kidney
and bladder diseases. Sold by Chas.
McNab, 4o2 Riverside avenue


Mrs. Victoria Bertha Bousquet died
at her home at 2402 Altamont street
in Liberty park. Friday evening. She
was % years old and leaves husband
and an infant child. The funeral SER
vices will be held Sunday morning and
the interment will be at Inglewood
cemetery, beyond Union park.
The surest and safest remedy for
kidney and bladder diseases is Foley
Kidney Cure Sold by Chas. McNab.
402 Riverside avenue.


Rev. w. M. Jones, pastor of the
Unitarian church, will deliver an adj
dress at the temple of mental science,
8l4k Riverside avenue, Pacific halD
Sunday evening. His subject is "The
Right and Wrong Of Believing" A
piano solo, 1.-The Shepherds Dream,
will be rendered by Miss Lily Bruce
Lyness.


Mold and shape your affairs so
that you can deposit at least small
sum in the savings bank every Satur-
day night between the hours of \
and o'clock This will soon become
to you an easy and agreeable task.
Spokane & Eastern Trust company.


A. M. Anderson, Indian agent of
the Colville reservation, is at the
Grand. He refuses to have any inter-
view regarding the charges said to be
made against his administration of In
dian affairs. He curtly told the re-
porter that there was nothing to be
given out"
